ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., bus, train, subway) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "route_length" REAL /* Length of the route */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route this trip belongs to */,
  "trip_name" TEXT /* Name of the trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "trip_type" TEXT /* Type of trip (e.g., regular, express) */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to this trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "stop_code" TEXT /* Code for the stop (e.g., 101S) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stop */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the stop */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip this schedule entry belongs to */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop this schedule entry belongs to */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "days_of_operation" TEXT /* Days of the week when this schedule is in effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip this assignment belongs to */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver this assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger this transaction belongs to */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip this transaction belongs to */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Amount of fare paid */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_transactions_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_transactions_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle this record belongs to */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realtime_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip this data point belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vehicle */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Is the data point valid? */,
  "vehicle_speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_bearing" REAL /* Bearing of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realtime_data_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_stops" (
  "route_stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route this stop belongs to */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "stop_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of the stop in the route */,
  "distance_from_previous_stop" REAL /* Distance from the previous stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_stops_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_stops_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_stops" (
  "trip_stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip stop */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip this stop belongs to */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "pickup_dropoff_type" TEXT /* Type of stop (e.g., pickup, dropoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_stops_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_stops_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger this feedback belongs to */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip this feedback belongs to */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data point */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route this traffic data point belongs to */,
  "traffic_date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic data */,
  "traffic_time" TEXT /* Time of the traffic data */,
  "traffic_level" TEXT /* Level of traffic (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip this alert belongs to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time of the alert */,
  "alert_text" TEXT /* Text of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)
